marks_distribution: Class IX: Section A (Reading Skills) - 20 Marks, Section B (Writing Skills & Grammar) - 20 Marks, Section C (Language through Literature) - 40 Marks. Total External: 80 Marks.
Class X: Section A (Reading Skills) - 20 Marks, Section B (Writing Skills & Grammar) - 20 Marks, Section C (Language through Literature) - 40 Marks. Total External: 80 Marks.
question_paper_design: Section A: Reading Comprehension via Unseen Passage (20 Marks). Includes Discursive passage (400-450 words, 10 marks) and Case-based factual passage with visual input (200-250 words, 10 marks). Question types: MCQs, Objective Type, VSA.

Section B: Grammar (10 Marks) covering Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-Verb Concord, Reported Speech. Assessed via Gap Filling/Editing/Transformation (12 questions, 10 attempted). Writing Skills (10 Marks): Descriptive Paragraph or Story/Diary Entry (Class IX); Formal Letter or Analytical Paragraph (Class X). Word limit 100-120 words.

Section C: Language through Literature (40 Marks). Reference to Context (10 Marks): Extracts from Drama/Prose and Poetry. Short & Long Answer Questions (30 Marks): Short answers from prescribed books (Beehive/Moments for Class IX; First Flight/Footprints Without Feet for Class X) assessing interpretation, analysis, inference, evaluation. Long answers assessing creativity, imagination, extrapolation.
competency_weightage: Reading Comprehension: Conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting, vocabulary (20 Marks).
Writing Skills & Grammar: Creative expression of opinion, reasoning, justifying, appropriate style/tone/format, fluency, applying conventions with accuracy (20 Marks).
Language through Literature: Recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, identifying central themes/sub-themes, understanding writer's message (40 Marks).
bloom_levels: Creative Expression, Imagination, Extrapolation beyond text.
Application of grammatical conventions and literary devices.
internal_assessment: Internal Assessment Total: 20 Marks (Class IX & X).
Listening and Speaking Skills: 5 Marks. Regular practice recommended. Art-integrated projects (Role Play, Skit, Dramatization) must be used.
Details refer to Circular no. Acad-11/2019 dated March 06, 2019.
practical_assessment: Listening and Speaking Skills Assessment (5 Marks). Parameters: Interactive competence (Initiation & turn taking), Fluency (cohesion, coherence, speed), Pronunciation, Language (grammar/vocabulary).
Activities include Role Play, Skit, Dramatization, Group Work, Discussions.
project_assessment: Art-integrated projects based on activities like Role Play, Skit, Dramatization.
Projects serve to diagnose mistakes and areas of non-learning while measuring learning outcomes.
